chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1998 of 2012 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections a/w reply as flagged 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 9333/2012 29.01.2018. Mr. Sundardas Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioners under the instructions of petitioners does not press this constitutional petition which is dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
